nasb.text: that the Lord spoke to Moses, saying, “I am the Lord; speak to Pharaoh king of Egypt all that I speak to you.”

esv.text: the Lord said to Moses, “I am the Lord; tell Pharaoh king of Egypt all that I say to you.”

cnv.text: 耶和華告訴摩西說：“我是耶和華，你要把我對你所說的一切話都告訴埃及王法老。”

ccb.text: “我是耶和华，你要把我吩咐你的一切话告诉埃及王法老。”
